name: chess-mcp
description: Grounded chess analysis — Stockfish + Maia via Docker. Skills: game review, repertoire builder, position analysis, annotated PGN.

hooks.command: docker start chess-mcp-server 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name chess-mcp-server -p 8000:8000 -e FASTMCP_HOST=0.0.0.0 -e ANALYSIS_DEPTH=18 -e STOCKFISH_PATH=/usr/games/stockfish -e EVAL_CACHE_PATH=/cache/eval-cache.db -v chess-mcp-eval-cache:/cache --restart unless-stopped ghcr.io/azeajr/chess-mcp:latest && timeout 15 bash -c 'until curl -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done'

args: MROOT=$(dirname "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT")/../../../marketplaces/chess-mcp; exec env REPERTOIRE_DIR="$MROOT/repertoires" uv run --directory "$MROOT/server" chess-files
